description_long: This is a square, low-profile sofa ottoman with a plush, tufted cushion upholstered in a warm brown leather or leather-like material. The cushion features deep button tufting arranged in a grid pattern, giving it a classic, luxurious appearance. The seat cushion is thick and appears to be well-padded, resting atop a slightly thinner base cushion of matching material. The entire structure is supported by a minimalist, black metal sled base that runs along the perimeter, providing a modern contrast to the traditional tufting. There are no visible armrests or backrests, emphasizing its use as an ottoman or modular seating. The overall design is both contemporary and timeless, suitable for urban parks, lobbies, or public seating areas.
description: A square, tufted brown leather ottoman with a thick cushion and a black metal sled base, lacking armrests or backrests. Its plush, button-tufted surface and modern frame make it ideal for urban public seating.
description_view_0: Front view shows the deep button-tufted cushion, thick padding, and the black metal sled base clearly.
description_view_1: Back view is nearly identical to the front, highlighting the uniform tufting and the continuous metal base.
description_view_2: Side view reveals the layered cushion structure and the full length of the metal sled base.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirrors the other side, emphasizing the plushness and symmetry of the ottoman.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Single, large, square seat cushion with deep button tufting; cushion is attached and uniform in size, covering the entire top surface.
attribute_armrest_style: No armrests present; the design is open on all sides with no raised or padded elements at the edges.
attribute_leg_design: Four black metal sled legs, one at each corner, connected by a perimeter frame; legs are exposed, straight, and have a modern, minimalist style.
attribute_backrest_type: No backrest present; the ottoman is flat and open, designed for sitting or resting feet.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Upholstery is solid brown leather with a grid of deep button tufting, creating a quilted, textured surface.
